params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: WSA v3 step 5-F D20b verification rotation — HR7 mission-goal persistence. Zeta in cumulative DONE but NOT in strict PC1-verified list (15/21). Prior PC1 evidence: #836 OK (v2.2.3), #865 OK (v2.2.3-REBUILT), #887 FAIL_INFRASTRUCTURE (v2.2.4 deploy issue). Production binary now v2.2.3 (ETAP_BUILD_DATE May 14 11:31). HIGH CONFIDENCE re-verify OK. Mission anchor: PII prompt → warning visible on user screen. tag=v2.2.3-zeta-L1-canary-pc1

test_steps: 2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
3. Submit PII prompt (RRN format) into the zeta chat input
4. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble OR replacement page OR alert (Korean '차단' text in DOM is primary signal)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied, add to PC1-verified list (strict 16/21 = 0.762)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible
verdict_criteria.FAIL_INFRASTRUCTURE: site unreachable or infrastructure-side failure (not APF failure)
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning

notes: WSA v3 D20b zeta L1 canary verify (PC1) — strict ratio advance candidate. Prior: #836 OK, #865 OK, #887 FAIL_INFRASTRUCTURE. Production binary v2.2.3 (May 14 11:31). Target: zeta-ai.io, anonymous session, check Korean warning '차단'. tag=v2.2.3-zeta-L1-canary-pc1
